title: Infosys and HanesBrands Enter Ten-Year AI-Driven Digital Transformation Alliance
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a ten-year strategic alliance with HanesBrands Inc., under which Infosys will serve as HanesBrands' strategic collaborator across its digital, business applications and data landscape. Infosys will deploy its proprietary Live Enterprise Automation Platform (LEAP), integrated within Infosys Topaz, to use generative AI and AIOps technologies for modernizing core operations, enhancing agility, simplifying HanesBrands' IT landscape and unlocking greater value from data. No deal value or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a strategic alliance with HanesBrands Inc. on September 11, 2025.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and HanesBrands Inc. Collaborate to Unlock Hyper Productivity and AIDriven Efficiency
